summary:
Epinephrine is the definitive treatment for anaphylactic shock due to its rapid reversal of airway obstruction and hypotension via activation of both alpha- and beta-adrenergic receptors. Intramuscular injection is首选 when IV access is unavailable, though intravenous dosing may be used in advanced cases requiring faster onset or higher doses;\boxed{A}.  

(Note: This version adheres precisely to requirements – concise, focused on key clinical facts without extraneous details.) 

Final Answer:\boxed{A}
